settings.title: Backed by the Union, Not Just Verified

settings.html:
✓

Dual Sign-Off Approval

Every agent is approved by both the SUG Director of Welfare and the Office of the President.

🛡

ID and Business Verified

NIN or CAC documents, matric numbers, and office addresses are checked before any agent goes live.

⚑

Report and Accountability

Every agent can be reported directly to the Welfare office and the Union is accountable.

settings.editor: This platform exists because students were dealing with housing agents nobody could vouch for. The SUG Welfare Directorate decided to fix that by building its own agency.

settings.html:
An agent on this platform is someone the Union itself stands behind.

Sign-Offs Per Agent

settings.editor: An agent does not simply sign up. Each application goes through a structured process.

settings.html:
• ✓ Full identity, business name, and contact details collected
  • ✓ NIN slip or CAC document reviewed
  • ✓ Matric number confirmed for Student Agents
  • ✓ Reviewed by the SUG Director of Welfare
  • ✓ Final sign-off from the Office of the President

settings.editor: Whether you want to apply as an agent or report an issue, the Welfare office responds within 24 hours.
